items.title: Honeywell Aerospace Spin Off Reshapes Capital Structure And Investor Focus
items.description: Honeywell International (NasdaqGS:HON) has started the spin-off of its Aerospace business into a separate company. The process includes private debt offerings and new credit facilities to fund the separation. The Aerospace unit has filed a Form 10 registration as a key regulatory step toward becoming a standalone entity. Honeywell has scheduled an Investor Day for the future aerospace company to outline its business profile and capital plans. If you follow industrials, you probably know...
